# Jaipuria Symposium 2026 - AI Access Guidelines

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Priority Pages for AI Understanding
Priority: /register
Priority: /agendas
Priority: /guides
Priority: /contact

# Key Content Areas
Content: /about-symposium
Content: /team
Content: /sponsors

# Assets
Assets: /assets/images/

# Restricted Pages
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /login

# Preferred Base URL
Canonical: https://jaipuriasymposium.org/

# Description
Description: Jaipuria Symposium 2026 is a premier inter-school debate symposium being hosted at Seth M. R. Jaipuria School, Lucknow on 7th and 8th August 2026.

# Contact
Contact: https://jaipuriasymposium.org/contact
